meta.title: Knowledge Graph Views
meta.description: Generated graph data containing book hierarchy view and knowledge relation view.

meta.title: Knowledge Relation Taxonomy
meta.description: General and discipline-specific edge definitions for knowledge graph construction.

provenanceRelations.description: Knowledge is formally defined in a source section.
Knowledge statement cites a source section.
Knowledge is supported by source evidence.

commonRelations.description: A is required before learning or applying B.
A and B are semantically related.
A and B are conceptually equivalent.
A is used to analyze B.
A provides a model basis for B.

mathematics.description: A can be transformed into B under valid rules.

physics.description: A is valid in regime/domain B.
A is experimentally verified by B.
